name: Eddy H. Gómez Ramírez
title: Director
notes: Listed as "Director" on CIMAR personnel page (Universidad de Costa Rica). Doctor en Ciencias del Mar con énfasis en Química, Universidad de Cádiz, España. Research lines: oceanografía, química, contaminación, producción primaria, nutrientes, estuarios, sedimentos.

name: Eduardo Siegle
title: Diretor
notes: New IO-USP directorship took office 2 December 2025 for a four-year term. Eduardo Siegle holds a PhD in Marine Sciences from University of Plymouth (UK, 2003); previously served as IO-USP vice-director, department head, and coordinator of the Postgraduate Program in Oceanography. Departamento de Oceanografia Física, Química e Geológica.

name: Márcia Caruso Bícego
title: Vice-Diretora
notes: Vice-Diretora (Deputy Director) of IO-USP from 2 December 2025. Associate Professor; PhD in Analytical Chemistry from USP (1996); MSc in Physical Oceanography from USP (1988); research in marine organic chemistry and environmental geochemistry.

name: David Oscar Yawson
title: CERMES Director
notes: Listed as "CERMES Director" on the official CERMES Staff page (UWI Cave Hill). Appointed Director in 2021. Promoted to Professor of Agri-Food Systems and Environmental Resilience effective 9 October 2024.

name: Neetha Selliah
title: Programme Coordinator
notes: Listed as "Programme Coordinator" on the official CERMES Staff page (UWI Cave Hill).

name: Mona Webber
title: Director, Centre for Marine Sciences
notes: PRML is administered by the UWI Mona Centre for Marine Sciences (CMS); the CMS Director leads PRML. Prof. Mona Webber is listed as Director on the CMS People page. Marine biologist/ecologist (zooplankton, mangroves) with 25+ years at UWI Mona; also Chair of Jamaica's National Fisheries Advisory Council (2022–).

name: Camilo Trench
title: Academic Coordinator
notes: Listed as "Academic Coordinator" on the CMS People page; primary point of contact for PRML/DBML academic resources, research activities, internships, boat use, diving and hyperbaric chamber operations.
